data.title: Carnarvon Energy Completes Strategic Investment and Share Purchase Plan
data.description:
Carnarvon Energy Limited ( (AU:CVN) ) just unveiled an update.

Carnarvon Energy Limited, a company involved in strategic investments, has completed the second tranche of its strategic placement with Strike Energy Limited and a share purchase plan, raising approximately A$36 million. The funds will be used for various projects including the completion of the South Erregulla 85MW Project, upstream field development for West Erregulla, and exploration wells at Walyering West and Ocean Hill, as well as for working capital and general corporate purposes.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CVN) stock is a Buy with a A$0.14 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Carnarvon Energy Limited stock, see the AU:CVN Stock Forecast page.

More about Carnarvon Energy Limited

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Greatland Resources Emphasizes Governance and Diversity in Latest Statement
data.description:
Greatland Resources ( (GB:GGP) ) just unveiled an update.

Greatland Resources Limited has released its Corporate Governance Statement, highlighting its commitment to high standards of corporate governance. The statement outlines the company’s compliance with the ASX Corporate Governance Principles and Recommendations, emphasizing the establishment of a Corporate Governance Charter and a Diversity and Inclusion Policy. The company has set measurable objectives for gender diversity, aiming to increase female representation in its workforce following the integration of employees from the Telfer-Havieron acquisition. This move reflects Greatland’s strategic efforts to enhance governance and diversity, potentially improving its industry positioning and stakeholder relations.

More about Greatland Resources

Greatland Resources Limited operates in the resources industry, focusing on exploration and development projects. The company is involved in the mining sector, with a significant market focus on the Telfer-Havieron acquisition, which has led to a substantial increase in its workforce.

See more insights into GGP stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Powerhouse Ventures Expands Portfolio with Strategic Investments in Quantum and AI
data.description:
Powerhouse Ventures Ltd. ( (AU:PVL) ) has issued an update.

Powerhouse Ventures Limited has announced new investments in Veriquantix, a quantum-based cybersecurity firm, and Sirius-beta Labs, a company specializing in situated reasoning for commercial and national security applications. These investments are part of the company’s strategy to launch the Critical Infrastructure Opportunities Fund under the Burleigh Ventures brand, aimed at capitalizing on global mega trends in quantum, AI, and space technologies. The investments highlight PVL’s ability to secure early positions in significant technological advancements, potentially enhancing shareholder value and positioning the company as a key player in the critical infrastructure sector.

More about Powerhouse Ventures Ltd.

Powerhouse Ventures Limited (PVL) operates in the investment industry, focusing on cutting-edge technology sectors such as AI, quantum computing, and space technologies. The company is involved in incubating new and existing fund products and has a strategic focus on increasing shareholder returns through diversified market exposures.

Average Trading Volume: 302,438

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$23.92M

data.title: Elders Limited Awaits ACCC Decision on Delta Agribusiness Acquisition
data.description:
An announcement from Elders Limited ( (AU:ELD) ) is now available.

Elders Limited is awaiting a decision from the Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) regarding its proposed acquisition of Delta Agribusiness Pty Ltd, with a provisional date set for 9 October 2025. The company is optimistic that the acquisition will enhance local agricultural markets by expanding product offerings and technical expertise for farmers.

data.title: Odessa Minerals Expands Exploration at Lyndon Project
data.description:
An update from Odessa Minerals Limited ( (AU:ODE) ) is now available.

Odessa Minerals Limited has announced an expansion of its sampling program at the Lyndon Project in Western Australia, following promising initial results of base metal mineralization at the Ebro Bore Prospect. The expanded program aims to further explore the 100km strike length of the Gneuda Formation carbonates, known for hosting significant copper-lead-zinc deposits, by conducting additional mapping and rock chip sampling at the Walga Well Prospect. This initiative could enhance Odessa’s operational capabilities and strengthen its position in the base metal exploration sector.

More about Odessa Minerals Limited

Odessa Minerals Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company’s primary activities involve the exploration of base metals, particularly copper, lead, and zinc, within carbonate-hosted mineralization formations in Western Australia.

Current Market Cap: A$11.2M

Learn more about ODE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: D. Western Therapeutics Gains FDA Approval for Bondlido Patch
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from D.Western Therapeutics Institute ( (JP:4576) ).

D. Western Therapeutics Institute, Inc. has received FDA approval for its new product, Bondlido, a lidocaine patch developed with MEDRx for treating post-herpetic neuralgia in adults. The product is expected to launch in the US in the first half of 2026, potentially improving the company’s earnings over the medium to long term by offering a superior alternative to existing products in the $162 million US lidocaine patch market.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4576) stock is a Sell with a Yen102.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on D.Western Therapeutics Institute stock, see the JP:4576 Stock Forecast page.

More about D.Western Therapeutics Institute

D. Western Therapeutics Institute, Inc. operates in the pharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development of therapeutic products. The company is known for its innovative approaches in drug development, particularly in collaboration with other firms, such as MEDRx, to enhance treatment options in the market.

Average Trading Volume: 1,156,304

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Medallion Metals Advances Ravensthorpe Gold Project with Key Permitting Milestone
data.description:
Medallion Metals Ltd ( (AU:MM8) ) has provided an announcement.

Medallion Metals Ltd has reached a significant permitting milestone for its Ravensthorpe Gold Project, as the public comment period under the EPBC Act concluded without any submissions. This marks a critical step in the company’s sulphide development strategy, with final documents to be submitted in October 2025 and an assessment decision expected by the end of the year. Approval under the EPBC Act is crucial for the project’s development timeline, with further secondary approvals required under Western Australian legislation.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MM8) stock is a Buy with a A$0.63 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Medallion Metals Ltd stock, see the AU:MM8 Stock Forecast page.

More about Medallion Metals Ltd

Medallion Metals Ltd is a company in the mining industry, focusing on the development of gold projects. Its primary project is the Ravensthorpe Gold Project, which involves mining at Ravensthorpe and processing at Forrestania, with a market focus on gold production.

Average Trading Volume: 958,457

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$321.2M

data.title: Thakral Corporation Ltd Announces The Beauty Tech Group’s Upcoming IPO
data.description:
An announcement from Thakral Corporation Ltd ( (SG:AWI) ) is now available.

Thakral Corporation Ltd announced that The Beauty Tech Group plc, in which it holds a 9.55% pre-IPO interest, plans to list its shares on the London Stock Exchange. The IPO price range is set between £2.51 and £2.91 per share, with an estimated market capitalization between £280 million and £320 million. Thakral has committed to selling up to 2,864,515 shares, potentially earning between £6.97 million and £8.09 million, depending on the final IPO price.

More about Thakral Corporation Ltd

Thakral Corporation Ltd, incorporated in Singapore, operates in the investment and asset management industry. The company focuses on holding interests in various subsidiaries and entities, including The Beauty Tech Group plc, which is involved in beauty technology.

data.description:
